grant_title: YouthWorks Employment and Training Program Grant
geographic_restrictions: Massachusetts, specifically the Greater Lowell region (Lowell, Dracut, Billerica, Tewksbury, Chelmsford, Dunstable, Tyngsborough, Westford)
project_area: Jobs training and employment for youth and young adults (ages 14-25) in construction, early education, and health/medical sectors
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations and agencies administering youth employment and training programs in the Greater Lowell region, with a focus on serving low-income youth and young adults aged 14-25.
